label: Butler Municipal Electric Light & Power
notes: NISC SmartHub portal (butler.smarthub.coop, confirmed Jun 2026) — extension scrapes billing + usage. kWh unverified on a real generation meter; verify before trusting reports.

label: Sussex Rural Electric Cooperative
notes: Electric co-op serving Sussex County (11K+ members). Third-party bill pay portal (srecbillpay.com), NOT on NISC SmartHub. Adapter needs a live login. Manual PDF upload meanwhile.

label: Public Service Electric & Gas (PSE&G)
notes: Largest IOU in NJ (1.8M customers, 55% of state). PSE&G MyAccount — bespoke portal, adapter needs a live login. Manual upload meanwhile.

label: Jersey Central Power & Light (JCP&L)
notes: Second-largest IOU (971K customers, 29% of state). FirstEnergy online account portal — bespoke, adapter needs a live login. Manual upload meanwhile.

label: Atlantic City Electric (ACE)
notes: Third-largest IOU (565K customers, 14% of state, southern NJ). Exelon-owned. Atlantic City Electric portal — bespoke, adapter needs a live login. Manual upload meanwhile.

label: Rockland Electric Company
notes: IOU serving northwestern Bergen County (72K customers, <2% of state). Orange & Rockland Utilities portal — bespoke, adapter needs a live login. Manual upload meanwhile.

label: Vineland Municipal Utilities
notes: Largest municipal in NJ. City of Vineland. Third-party bill pay portal (vmupay.vinelandcity.org), NOT on NISC SmartHub. Adapter needs a live login. Manual PDF upload meanwhile.
